name: Reports
author: Diduhless
readme_markdown:
Download the plugin on poggit: [![Poggit](https://poggit.pmmp.io/shield.state/Reports)](https://poggit.pmmp.io/p/Reports)
Join my GitHub discord server: [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/732039634745425972?color=%2392e5fc&label=discord)](https://discord.gg/bsFSwTR) # Reports 📢 A reports plugin for pocketmine servers ## Functionality - Players can report other players with **/report** - This command will open a form where you can select an online player and the reason for the report. - You can put as many reasons as you want in the config! - Players will also have to wait a specific amount of seconds to send another report. - Those who have the admin permission will be able to see the reports in-game (default: *reports.admin*) - Admins can view the report list with **/reportlist** - This plugin uses **webhook** support, if set up correctly the reports will be also sent in discord! ## Virions used - [EasyUI](https://github.com/andresbytes/EasyUI) by **andresbytes**
- [DiscordWebhookAPI](https://github.com/CortexPE/DiscordWebhookAPI) by **CortexPE** ## Pictures ![Message](https://i.imgur.com/diNb78e.png)
![Embed](https://i.imgur.com/aQlwKSN.png)
![ReportForm](https://i.imgur.com/aLmxB2W.png)
![ReportList](https://i.imgur.com/1OLwuMq.png)
![ReportOptions](https://i.imgur.com/rzHdnzZ.png)
